tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold @tommy/multi-step-form lib + host wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New Angular library registered as experiment #2, reachable at /multi-step-form with a minimal intro placeholder.

**Files:** generated libs/tommy/multi-step-form/**; multi-step-flow.ts/.html/.css; src/index.ts; tsconfig.base.json (alias); apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments.ts (+entry).

**Acceptance Criteria:** lib tagged scope:tommy,type:experiment; @tommy/multi-step-form alias resolves; EXPERIMENTS entry + /multi-step-form route render; intro Start button; lint+test pass.

**Verify:** pnpm nx serve tommy-host (route renders); pnpm nx lint tommy-multi-step-form; pnpm nx build tommy-host.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/index.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.ts","tsconfig.base.json","apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx lint tommy-multi-step-form && pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lib tagged scope:tommy,type:experiment","alias resolves","EXPERIMENTS entry + route render","intro Start renders","lint+test pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ui.css design layer (Tailwind+spartan, plain-CSS fallback)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stable .ui-* stylesheet every component references, so downstream tasks don't depend on the alpha UI lib working.

**Files:** libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/ui.css; apps/tommy/host/src/styles.css; .postcssrc.json; package.json.

**Acceptance Criteria:** ui.css defines .ui-card/.ui-input/.ui-label/.ui-error/.ui-muted/.ui-btn/.ui-btn-primary/.ui-step/.ui-step-active/.ui-step-done; Tailwind v4 + spartan tokens compile OR plain-CSS fallback with same class names; host build succeeds + styled element renders; README records decision.

**Verify:** pnpm nx build tommy-host exits 0; serve shows styled Start button.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/ui.css","apps/tommy/host/src/styles.css",".postcssrc.json","package.json"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all .ui-* classes defined","tailwind+spartan compiles OR plain-css fallback same names","host build + styled render","README records styling decision"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend contract types + simulated FlowService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Typed backend contract + injectable service simulating async load/submit (deterministic, fake-timer friendly).

**Files:** flow-options.ts; flow.service.ts; flow.service.spec.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** loadOptions() returns constraints + >=1 required & >=1 optional TOS; submitFlow() rejects 'taken' (case-insensitive) with username field error else {ok,confirmationId} containing username; no Math.random/Date.now (setTimeout delay).

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form -- flow.service (3 tests).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/flow-options.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/flow.service.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/flow.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form -- flow.service", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loadOptions constraints + required/optional TOS","submitFlow rejects 'taken'","submitFlow success confirmationId","deterministic fake-timer friendly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Model + reusable composed schemas + createFlowForm
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Model, three reusable sub-schemas composed into flowSchema(opts) via apply/applyEach, and factory building the root form post-load.

**Files:** flow-model.ts; flow-schema.ts; create-flow-form.ts; flow-schema.spec.ts; create-flow-form.spec.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** accountSchema(opts) enforces username min/max + password min from opts; confirmPassword passwordMismatch unless equals password; required TOS mustAccept; flowSchema composes all; root valid only when all groups valid; form().value()=FlowModel; emptyFlowModel seeds tos; createFlowForm via runInInjectionContext.

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form (schema + factory specs).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/flow-model.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/flow-schema.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/create-flow-form.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/flow-schema.spec.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/create-flow-form.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form", "acceptanceCriteria": ["username/password constraints from opts","confirmPassword cross-field","required TOS must accept","flowSchema composition + value","emptyFlowModel seeds tos","createFlowForm runInInjectionContext"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Presentational step components + step indicator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dumb OnPush components rendering a FieldTree slice via [formField]; no nav logic.

**Files:** steps/profile-step.ts; steps/account-step.ts; steps/tos-step.ts; step-indicator.ts; steps/steps.spec.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** each step field=input.required<FieldTree<..>>() + showErrors=input(false); profile/account bind text inputs + reveal errors; TosStep items input, iterates TOS FieldTree, binds checkbox [formField]=ack.accepted, shows title/body + required marker; smoke test renders incl 2 checkboxes.

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form -- steps.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/steps/profile-step.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/steps/account-step.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/steps/tos-step.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/step-indicator.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/steps/steps.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form -- steps", "acceptanceCriteria": ["field+showErrors inputs","profile/account formField + error reveal","tos iterates field tree + checkbox + text","smoke render incl 2 checkboxes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: MultiStepFlow container (phases, gated nav, submit)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Entry component as phase/step state machine: start->load->build form->gated steps->submit() (server errors mapped to username)->done.

**Files:** multi-step-flow.ts/.html/.css; multi-step-flow.spec.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** start() loading->loadOptions->createFlowForm->form phase (error on failure); Next gated by current step validity; Back preserves data; last step Submit via submit() success->done w/confirmationId; 'taken'->server error on account step; reset() clears; FlowService provided; smoke intro->profile after Start.

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form -- multi-step-flow; manual serve walkthrough.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.ts","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.html","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.css","libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form -- multi-step-flow", "acceptanceCriteria": ["start loads + builds form","Next gated; Back preserves data","submit success->done; taken->server error","reset clears","smoke intro->profile"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Verification & lib docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm whole experiment builds/lints/tests green and document the lib.

**Files:** libs/tommy/multi-step-form/README.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** run-many lint/test/typecheck for lib+host passes; nx build tommy-host succeeds with lazy multi-step-form chunk; README documents features, file map, test command, styling decision.

**Verify:** pnpm nx run-many -t lint test typecheck -p tommy-multi-step-form tommy-host && pnpm nx build tommy-host.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/multi-step-form/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx run-many -t lint test typecheck -p tommy-multi-step-form tommy-host && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["run-many green","host build lazy chunk","README documents experiment + styling"]}
```
